message:
feat(python): numpy.ma.masked_equal wrapper parity (franken_numpy-2g6u)

Add fnp_python.masked_equal(x, value, copy=True) as a passthrough
delegator to np.ma.masked_equal so equality-based masking (including
the NaN-handling convention where masked_equal with NaN matches
nothing) and MaskedArray return-type semantics match numpy exactly
across integer/float/bool/2-D inputs.

Covered by one pyo3 oracle test with seven scenarios: int64 data
matching an int sentinel, float64 data with int sentinel, no-match
(nothing masked), all-match (everything masked), 2-D input,
boolean data, and copy=False forwarded — each repr-compared to
np.ma.masked_equal.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
